testcase.name: stripe webhook handles checkout.session.completed and marks order as paid
testcase.file: tests\Feature\WebhookTest.php::stripe webhook handles checkout.session.completed and marks order as paid
testcase.failure:
stripe webhook handles checkout.session.completed and marks order as paidExpected response status code [200] but received 500. Failed asserting that 500 is identical to 200.
